RESPONSES TO THE INTERROGATORIES SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. J. MICHAEL PHELPS, TEL. NO. 433-3733 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS CAROL WANG AND C W ENTERPRISES' Motion To Disqualify J. Michael Phelps IS DENIED. MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Real Management Company, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions is denied. The motion has been withdrawn as to Numbers 7, 10, 13, 14, 17, 20, 21, and 22. The responses as to Numbers 5, 6, 8, 9, 11, 12, 16, 18, and 19 were made in compliance with the Code Of Civil Procedure. Notice Of Motion Adn Motion To Compel Further Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Carol Wang, CW Enterprises' Motion To Compel Further Production Of Documents is moot as additional documents have been produced. The court will not determine the adequacy of that supplemental production on this motion. Counsel are ordered to meet and confer. The reply separate statement is a starting point for those discussions. Counsel are advised that the court would not approve Plaintiff's general objections. There is no provision in the code of civil procedure for general objections. The court would not approve the objections made in the individual responses, except at there may be privilege objections which shall be made only if there are documents falling within a privilege in which case those documents must be identified with particularity.

The court finds that the responses and objections were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,640, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
